response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video: Identified performer as Omaru Polka (via birthday event hashtag) and song title as 'Diamond Crevasse' with composer Yoko Kanno via on-screen text. 2. Performed web search for 'Diamond Crevasse' lyrics in Japanese and English using original composer 'Yoko Kanno'. 3. Mapped the song performance to a single scene after the brief musical intro. 4. Formatted the scene data and full lyrics into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: This video features a full vocal performance of the song "Diamond Crevasse" (originally by Yoko Kanno, famously performed by May'n/Sheryl Nome) by the VTuber Omaru Polka, during her 2026 birthday event. The video includes a short musical intro followed by the complete song performance.

scenes.description: The video begins with stage lighting effects. Omaru Polka is on stage preparing for the performance.
Omaru Polka begins singing "Diamond Crevasse". The song performance continues until the end of the video.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
神様に恋をしてた頃は
こんな別れがくるとは思ってなかったよ
もう二度と触れられないなら
せめて最後に もう一度抱きしめて欲しかったよ

It's long long good-bye...
さよなら さよなら 何度だって
自分に 無上に 言い聞かせて
手を振るのは 優しさだよね?
今強さが欲しい

貴方に出会い STAR輝いて アタシが生まれて
愛すればこそ iあればこそ
希望のない 奇跡を待って どうなるの?
涙に滲む 惑星の瞬きは gone...

忘れないよ 貴方の温もりも
その優しさも 全て包んでくれた両手も
It's long long good-bye...
さよなら さよなら 愛しい人
貴方が いたから 歩いてこれた
ひとりなんかじゃなかったよね?
今答えが欲しい

燃える様な流星 捕まえて
火を灯して
愛していたい 愛されてたい
冷えたカラダひとつで 世界は どうなるの?

張り続けてた 虚勢が溶けてく long for...
どうしてなの? 涙溢れて 止められない

貴方に出会い STAR輝いて アタシが生まれて
愛すればこそ iあればこそ
希望のない 奇跡を待って どうなるの?
涙に滲む 惑星の瞬きは gone...

もし生まれ変わって また巡り会えるなら
その時もきっと アタシを見つけ出して
もう二度と離さないで 捕まえてて
ひとりじゃないと 囁いてほしい planet...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When I was in love with God,
I never thought such a parting would come.
If we can never touch again,
I wish you had held me one last time.

It's long long good-bye...
Good-bye, good-bye, how many times,
I tell myself, so heartlessly.
Is waving my hand a kindness?
I want strength now.

Meeting you, the stars shone, and I was born.
Because I love, because I exist.
Waiting for a miracle without hope, what will become of it?
In my tears, the planet's twinkling is gone...

I won't forget, your warmth,
And that kindness, and both hands that embraced me entirely.
It's long long good-bye...
Good-bye, good-bye, my beloved person.
Because you were here, I could walk on.
I wasn't alone, was I?
I want an answer now.

Catch a burning meteor,
Light a fire.
I want to love, I want to be loved.
With just my cold body, what will become of the world?

The bravado I kept holding onto melts away, long for...
Why? Tears overflowing, I cannot stop them.

Meeting you, the stars shone, and I was born.
Because I love, because I exist.
Waiting for a miracle without hope, what will become of it?
In my tears, the planet's twinkling is gone...

If I am reborn and we can meet again,
I am sure, please find me again then too.
Don't let go of me ever again, hold onto me,
I want you to whisper that I'm not alone, planet...
